functions.name: aria_studio.app.routes.device_routes.thumbnail_jpeg
documentation:
Retrieve the thumbnail for a specified file.
Args:

Returns:

functions.name: aria_studio.app.routes.device_routes.thumbnail_gif
documentation:
Retrieve the gif thumbnail for a specified file.

Returns:
    FileResponse: The file response object containing the thumbnail.

* Delete a group.
* List all groups.
* Add files to a group.
* Remove files from a group.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogEntry.to_dict

Gets the dictionary representation of the log entry.
Used for sending data to the Meta's back-end,
hence dict's keys must match expected by the endpoint.

documentation:
Gets the list representation of the log entry.
Used for writing data to the local log file.

documentation: Creates a new instance of the log entry from the list representation.

The log entry to be logged to the local log file.

classes.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new instance of the local log manager.
Sets the log file name for duration of the session.

WARNING:
This class is a singleton. Each call to create a new instance will
return the first created during given session. This method is thread-safe.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.log
documentation:
Logs the back-end event to the local log file.

Assumes:
- timestamp is set to current time,
- surface is set to BACK_END,
- source is set to the caller's file name and line number.

Args:
- event: the event's type,
- screen: the screen, where the event originated,
- message: the message with detailed description of the event.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.log_event
documentation:
Logs the front-end event to the local log file.

Args:
- entry: the entry to add for logged event.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.sync
documentation: Synchronizes unpublished entries to Meta's back-end.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__get_device_info
documentation: Adds device info to the log entry.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__get_session_info
documentation:
Adds session info to the log entry.
If entry is of type SESSION, then store the session_id and its timestamp.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__get_host_info
documentation: Fills in the host information in provided log entry and returns it as a dictionary.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__submit_entry
documentation:
Handles submitting log for logged in user.
Fills in the host information in log entry and submits it to the server.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.local.local_log_manager.LocalLogManager.__submit_logged_out_entry
documentation:
Handles submitting log for logged out user.
Fills in the host information in log entry and submits it to the server.
The class to manage the local logging operations.

We find all the failed features and submit one single request for all of them.

Actual implementation of the visualization logic. This method will be called by the

An abstract class representing a task that can be logged to Rerun.
Performs actual visualization logic.

methods.name: aria_studio.utils.rerun_manager.RerunManager.start_frozen_rerun
documentation:
Start the rerun viewer binary in the frozen application
Rerun viewer is a separate binary that is bundled with the frozen application.
To use this binary, we run the bundled one and to view the data, we connect to it.

A base class managing rerun playback of a single type. Implemented as a singleton to avoid
conflicts with mutliple processes accessing the same rerun instance.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.set_adb_path
documentation: Set the path to adb executable.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.check_device_connected
documentation: Check if the device is connected.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.device_heartbeat
documentation:
Monitor the device status periodically and clear the cache if the device has
been disconnected.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.get_status
documentation: Get the status of the device

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.delete_files
documentation: Delete files from the device.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.list_vrs_files
documentation: List recordings on the device.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._pull_file
documentation: Pull a single file from the device.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.get_thumbnail_jpeg
documentation: Get first thumbnail for the VRS file from .

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.get_thumbnail_gif
documentation: Pull thumbnails and create a gif file from the thumbnails.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.get_metadata
documentation: Pull metadata file from device.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._shell_cat
documentation: Helper to run adb exec-out cat command to read binary files

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._list_thumbnails
documentation: List thumbnails for a VRS file.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.start_copy_vrs_files
documentation: Start copying files asynchronously.
Apis to copy files from device to local

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._copy_monitor
documentation:
Start and monitor the copy operation.
This is a coroutine that runs in the background and updates progress.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.cancel_copy
documentation:
Cancel the current copy operation and clean up partial files.
Handles ADB connection issues and ensures proper cleanup of temporary files.

Raises:
    AriaException: If no copy is in progress or if the cancellation fails

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._cleanup_partial_files
documentation: Clean up partial files.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager.get_copy_progress
documentation: Get the copy progress.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._copy_vrs_and_metadata
documentation:
Copy a single vrs file from device to local along with the metadata file.
The file is copied to a .partial file and then renamed.
Optionally delete the file from device if delete_src is True.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._copy_thumbnail_from_device_cache_to_local_file_cache
documentation:
Copy thumbnail from device cache.
If thumbnail is not found, then no action.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._get_total_size
documentation: Get the total size of files in a list.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._adb_command
documentation: Helper to execute adb command asynchronously.

methods.name: aria_studio.app.device.device_manager.DeviceManager._adb_command_in_cmd
documentation: Execute ADB command through CMD and return stdout/stderr.

The class to manage the interaction with the Aria Device
* Pull files from the device.
* Delete files from the device.
* List files on the device.
* Fetch device status
    * Fetch Wi-Fi SSID
    * Fetch Bluetooth device name
    * Fetch battery status
* Fetch thumbnails
